title: ProtocolLab Scenario v2
description: Schema for ProtocolLab v2 scenario definition files, including typed TLS, gRPC, secure DNS, and binding-specific WebSocket contracts.

version.description: Semantic version of this scenario document's behavior

semanticTemplateId.description: Stable shared workload-semantic identity used across binding-specific scenarios

protocolStack.description: Ordered application-to-transport protocol stack required by the scenario

upstreamStandards.description: Official standards or protocol source documents governing the scenario binding

resumptionPolicy.description: Whether resumption is not offered or an accepted PSK from a proven single-use ticket is required

serverName.description: Exact SNI and certificate reference identity

grpc.description: Language-neutral gRPC over HTTP/2 operation binding

dns.description: Deterministic DNS query semantics with secure or classic diagnostic transport binding

fixtureId.description: Stable identity of the canonical DNS wire fixture used by this scenario

executionProfile.description: Implementation-neutral execution and security facts required for comparison

payloadSha256.description: SHA-256 of the raw bytes field payload

serializedProtobufBytes.description: Encoded protobuf message size before gRPC framing

serializedProtobufSha256.description: SHA-256 of the encoded protobuf message

grpcFrameBytes.description: Five-byte gRPC envelope plus encoded protobuf message

grpcFrameSha256.description: SHA-256 of the complete gRPC message frame
